data.query: average studio rent near UCL Bloomsbury London 2025
data.results:
### Web Search: studio rent near UCL / Bloomsbury
Zoopla (market data): studios in the Bloomsbury / UCL area typically let for about £1,400 to £1,900 per month (roughly £320-£440 per week).
Rightmove: current Bloomsbury studio listings mostly range £1,450-£1,850 pcm.
SpareRoom: purpose-built student studios near UCL are often quoted £320-£420 per week, bills included.
Note: these are area asking-rent RANGES, not a single average figure.

detailed_data.web_search_0: Zoopla: studios ~£1,400-£1,900 pcm in Bloomsbury/UCL area
detailed_data.web_search_2: SpareRoom: student studios near UCL ~£320-£420 pw
